/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,libarm_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_c.so -o libarm_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_c.so CMakeFiles/arm_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_c.dir/rosidl_typesupport_c/arm_interfaces/srv/arm_command__type_support.cpp.o CMakeFiles/arm_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_c.dir/rosidl_typesupport_c/arm_interfaces/srv/cargo__type_support.cpp.o CMakeFiles/arm_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_c.dir/rosidl_typesupport_c/arm_interfaces/srv/get_target_pose__type_support.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,/home/scr/robocup/amr_robot_ws/build/arm_interfaces:/opt/ros/humble/lib: libarm_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_typesupport_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic -Wl,-rpath-link,/opt/ros/humble/lib
